notes: First validated case for the fully cursor-warp-free Notes recipe.
create-note asserts cursorDisturbance=none, pressMechanism=ax-action, performedAction=AXPress and all three signals matched on the validating run.
focus-body asserts cursorDisturbance=none, focusMechanism=ax-attribute, setAttribute=AXFocused and all three signals matched on the validating run.
Recipe-level disturbance is clipboard (not pointer); no step warps the macOS cursor.
Promoted to validated on 2026-05-21 after a live Notes run completed all 5 steps (run_1779331606491_23584_0).
